description.value:
Women who suffered wrongful deaths and accepted dark power's gift. Rise one year and a day after death as frail-looking hags with great power. Appear bent and veiled, but when angered reveal true forms with long arms, sharp claws, jagged teeth, glowing eyes.

Category: Folklore Monster

Characteristics

STR
110		 CON
105		 SIZ
90		 DEX
80		 INT
65		 POW
125

HP: 19 | DB: +1D6 | Build: 2 | Move: 12

Attacks

AttackSkillDamage
Claws45%1D6+DB
Bite45%1D4+DB

Armor: 3 points thick leathery skin; takes half damage from mundane weapons

Skills: Climb 75%, Jump 55%, Listen 65%, Spot Hidden 50%, Stealth 65%

Sanity Loss: 1/1D8

Special Abilities

  • Hunger for human flesh
  • Take only half damage from mundane weapons
  • Heal quickly - return to lair to fully heal when sun sets
  • Know 2-5 spells, often folkloric and tied to death method
  • Physical traits relate to how they died (seaweed if drowned, moss if starved, etc.)
  • Filthy - wounds from hags suffer penalty die for infection checks
